description: Drop-in course records merged into the learnable index.

records.title: Emergency First Aid Essentials
records.subject: health
records.description: Hands-only CPR, choking, bleeding control, and when to call for help.

records.title: Home Fire Safety
records.subject: safety
records.description: Smoke alarms, escape planning, grease fires, and extinguisher use.

records.title: Defensive Driving Fundamentals
records.subject: transport
records.description: Following distance, skid recovery, blowouts, and hazard anticipation.

records.title: Water & Boating Safety
records.subject: safety
records.description: Life jackets, rip currents, cold water shock, and man-overboard response.

records.title: Personal Cyber Hygiene
records.subject: technology
records.description: Phishing, passphrases, MFA, updates, and the 3-2-1 backup rule.

records.title: De-escalation & Conflict Resolution
records.subject: soft-skills
records.description: Active listening, calming techniques, and safe bystander intervention.

records.title: Severe Weather Preparedness
records.subject: safety
records.description: Tornado sheltering, flood safety, emergency kits, and evacuation.

records.title: Workplace Safety Basics (OSHA-aligned)
records.subject: safety
records.description: Fatal Four hazards, PPE, lockout/tagout, and safe lifting.
